title: Tag Box
description: A component that provides a container for displaying and managing multiple tags, with support for adding, removing, and customizing tags through keyboard input and autocomplete functionality.

sections.title: Auto Complete
sections.description: Example of tag box with autocomplete functionality

sections.title: Custom Templates
sections.description: Demonstrates custom templates for both tag rendering and autocomplete suggestions with categorized items and colors.

sections.title: Header and Footer Templates
sections.description: Demonstrates using listHeaderTemplate and listFooterTemplate to add custom content above and below the autocomplete suggestion list.

props.name: addOnComma
props.description: Whether to add tags when comma key is pressed

props.name: addOnEnter
props.description: Whether to add tags when enter key is pressed

props.name: valueField
props.description: Field name to use as the value identifier for tag objects

props.name: textField
props.description: Field name to use as the display text for tag objects

props.name: readonlyField
props.description: Field name to check if a tag should be readonly

props.name: allowDuplicateValues
props.description: Whether to allow duplicate tag values

props.name: tagTemplate
props.description: Custom template for rendering individual tags

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the input field. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: Array of tag objects. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the component is readonly. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name attribute for the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: Validation state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onKeyDown
events.description: Fired when a key is pressed down. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyUp
events.description: Fired when a key is released. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Fired when a key is pressed. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onTextChanged
events.description: Fired when the input text changes. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Fired when the value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Emitted when the value changes (deprecated, use ngModelChange). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look property changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onItemSelected
events.description: Fired when an item is selected from autocomplete. Inherited from AXAutocompleteParentComponent.

events.name: onTagClick
events.description: Emitted when a tag within the tag box is clicked.

events.name: onTagDblClick
events.description: Emitted when a tag within the tag box is double-clicked.

events.name: onTagContextMenu
events.description: Emitted when a tag within the tag box is right-clicked (context menu).

methods.content:
/**
 * Adds items to the tag box.
 *
 * @param items - Array of objects to add as tags
 */
addItems(items: object[]): void

/**
 * Removes a tag at the specified index.
 *
 * @param index - Index of the tag to remove
 */
removeItem(index: number): void

/**
 * Converts input values to tag objects.
 *
 * @param v - Value to convert (string, object, or array)
 * @returns Array of tag objects
 */
convertString(v: unknown): object[]

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 *
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
commitValue(value: unknown[], u?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 *
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
reset(e?: boolean): void

/**
 * Validates the component.
 *
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - Validation result.
 */
validate(): Promise<AXValidationSummary>
